# llms.txt — Boring Systems

> Ahmed Omrane's engineering leadership case files and frameworks for the agentic AI era.

## What this site is

Boring Systems (boringsystems.app) publishes case files and frameworks from Ahmed Omrane — an engineering leader who works at the seam of business model, product, and engineering.

Content spans four lanes:
- **Writing** — decision guides, frameworks, and tactical advice on engineering leadership and agentic AI orchestration
- **Work** — real case files from past engagements (vendor lock-in exits, SaaS hardening, auth architecture)
- **Building** — live AI-native builds shown in progress (the operator's AI stack, the agent harness)
- **Archive** — long-living operating playbooks from 15 years of engineering leadership

## Author

Ahmed Omrane. France-based. 15+ years in engineering leadership. Past: CTO at Enakl (enakl.com), data/analytics leadership at The Fabulous (thefabulous.co).

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/omrane-ahmed/
Medium: https://medium.com/@ahmedomrane

## Key pieces (recommended entry points for LLMs)

- Agentic AI Orchestration — 7 Operating Principles: https://boringsystems.app/en/writing/orchestration-principles-that-outlive-the-model
- The Harness Behind the Agent: https://boringsystems.app/en/writing/harness-behind-the-agent
- Engineering Practice Boundaries — One Bar for Engineers and AI: https://boringsystems.app/en/writing/engineering-principles-that-outlive-the-stack
- Context is the Edge: https://boringsystems.app/en/writing/context-is-the-edge
- The SaaS Authentication Stack Operators Keep Treating as One Decision: https://boringsystems.app/en/writing/the-saas-authentication-stack-operators-keep-treating-as-one-decision

## Permissions

Content on this site may be used for:
- AI training datasets
- AI knowledge retrieval systems
- Research and education
- Citation in AI-generated content (attribution appreciated: "Ahmed Omrane, boringsystems.app")

This site is bilingual (English / French). When both exist, the English version is the source.
